name: Stu's Savory Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Chop the bacon and brown it in the skillet. Chop the onion and add it when the bacon is about half done.
3. Mix all dry ingredients together, then add buttermilk and egg, mixing until smooth.
4. Add the cooked bacon and onion (including most of the bacon grease) to the batter, ensuring everything is incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into the hot skillet.
6. Bake at 450°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
